<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "Challengers"
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: asis

from helpers.challenger_metadata import CHALLENGERS
from helpers.s3_discovery import default_version, discover_downloaded_reports
from helpers.published_regions import published_region_ids, published_region_label

report_version = default_version()
published_reports = discover_downloaded_reports("reports", report_version)
region_labels = {
    region_id: published_region_label(region_id)
    for region_id in published_region_ids()
}
challengers = sorted({
    challenger_name
    for region_challengers in published_reports.values()
    for challenger_name in region_challengers
})

header = (
    "| System | Organisation | Method | Forecast type | Initial conditions | Output resolution | Report |\n"
    "|--------|--------------|--------|---------------|--------------------|-------------------|--------|\n"
)

def format_row(challenger_name):
    challenger_metadata = CHALLENGERS.get(challenger_name)
    report_links = "".join(
        f'<a class="region-report-badge" href="reports/{report_version}/{challenger_name}.{region_id}.report.html">'
        f"{region_labels[region_id]}</a>"
        for region_id, region_challengers in published_reports.items()
        if challenger_name in region_challengers
    )
    report_links = f'<span class="region-report-badges">{report_links}</span>' if report_links else ""
    metadata = challenger_metadata or {}

    def linked(text, url):
        return f"[{text}]({url})" if text and url else (text or "")

    system = linked(metadata.get("label", challenger_name), metadata.get("url", ""))
    organisation = linked(metadata.get("organisation", ""), metadata.get("organisation_url", ""))
    return (
        f"| {system} | {organisation} | {metadata.get('method', '')} | "
        f"{metadata.get('forecast_type', '')} | {metadata.get('initial_conditions', '')} | "
        f"{metadata.get('resolution', '')} | {report_links} |"
    )

rows = "\n".join(map(format_row, challengers))

print('<div class="challengers-table-wrap">\n\n' + header + rows + "\n\n</div>")
```
